title: Nature & Weather Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The air you take in and let out of your lungs.
choices: breath
sweat
surface
rounds.answer: breath
rounds.explanation: breath: The air you take in and let out of your lungs.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A large field of grass and flowers where animals graze.
choices: breath
sweat
meadow
rounds.answer: meadow
rounds.explanation: meadow: A large field of grass and flowers where animals graze.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Covered with, or full of, snow.
choices: sweat
snowy
breath
rounds.answer: snowy
rounds.explanation: snowy: Covered with, or full of, snow.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The clear water that comes from your skin when you are hot.
rounds.answer: sweat

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A part of the sea or a lake that is partly surrounded by land.
rounds.answer: bay

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A mountain that can erupt with hot lava, ash, and gas.
rounds.answer: volcano

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: I took a deep breath before I started to speak.
The surface of the lake was calm and shiny.
The sheep ate grass in the sunny meadow.

rounds.explanation: The sheep ate grass in the sunny meadow.

choices: A part of the sea or a lake that is partly surrounded by land.

rounds.answer: A part of the sea or a lake that is partly surrounded by land.
rounds.explanation: The small boats sailed safely into the bay.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The hail made a loud noise when it hit the roof.

rounds.answer: We built a snowman on the snowy day.
